name: resume-assistant
description: AI-powered resume assistant: polish resumes, customize for jobs, export to Word/Markdown/HTML/LaTeX/PDF, and score with actionable feedback.
author: resume-assistant-team

commands.name: polish
commands.description: Polish and improve resume content with a comprehensive checklist review.

arguments.name: resume_content
arguments.description: The resume content to polish (plain text or Markdown).

arguments.name: language
arguments.description: Resume language: 'en' for English, 'zh' for Chinese.

commands.name: customize
commands.description: Tailor a resume for a specific job position with keyword optimization.

arguments.name: job_description
arguments.description: The target job description or job title.

arguments.name: language
arguments.description: Resume language: 'en' for English, 'zh' for Chinese.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a resume to Word, Markdown, HTML, LaTeX, or PDF format.

arguments.name: resume_content
arguments.description: The resume content to export (Markdown format preferred).

commands.name: score
commands.description: Score an existing resume and provide strengths, weaknesses, and actionable improvement suggestions.

arguments.name: target_role
arguments.description: Optional target role to evaluate the resume against.

arguments.name: language
arguments.description: Resume language: 'en' for English, 'zh' for Chinese.
